ui.params.range_sliders

Numeric range sliders with custom painting, dialogs, and overlays.

   1"""Numeric range sliders with custom painting, dialogs, and overlays."""
   2
   3from __future__ import annotations
   4
   5import random
   6import re
   7from typing import Any, Dict, Generic, List, Optional, Tuple, TypeVar
   8
   9from PySide6.QtCore import QEvent, QObject, QPoint, QRect, Qt, Signal
  10from PySide6.QtGui import QColor, QFontMetrics, QPainter, QPalette, QPen, QTextDocument, QShowEvent
  11from PySide6.QtWidgets import (
  12    QApplication,
  13    QCheckBox,
  14    QDialog,
  15    QDialogButtonBox,
  16    QFormLayout,
  17    QGridLayout,
  18    QHBoxLayout,
  19    QLabel,
  20    QLineEdit,
  21    QMenu,
  22    QSizePolicy,
  23    QSpinBox,
  24    QStyle,
  25    QStyleOptionSlider,

  29)

  31from dialogs.dialogs import (
  32    AskResult,
  33    range_slider_ask_clamp_value,
  34    range_slider_ask_extend_range,
  35    show_warning,
  36)
  37from settings.app_style import SLIDER_BORDER_STYLE_SHEET, SliderBorderState
  38from settings.ui_defaults import SLIDER_LABEL_SIZE, UNIT_LABEL_SIZE
  39from ui.labels import SvgLabel
  40from ui.numeric_line_edit import NumericLineEdit
  41from ui.params.parameter_widget_base import ParameterWidgetBase
  42from ui.params.sliders import FloatSlider
  43from ui.right_click_overlay import RightClickOverlay
  44from utils.helper_funcs import get_numeric_format_field, value_to_text
  45
  46TNum = TypeVar("TNum", int, float)
  47
  48
  49def _map_val_to_pos(v: float, v_min: float, v_max: float, p_min: int, p_max: int) -> int:
  50    """Map a numeric value linearly to an integer position.
  51
  52    Args:
  53        v: Numeric value to map.
  54        v_min: Minimum value of the source interval.
  55        v_max: Maximum value of the source interval.
  56        p_min: Minimum integer position of the destination interval.
  57        p_max: Maximum integer position of the destination interval.
  58
  59    Returns:
  60        Rounded integer position.
  61
  62    Note:
  63        If ``v_min == v_max``, the mapping is degenerate and ``p_min`` is
  64        returned.
  65    """
  66    if v_max == v_min:
  67        return p_min
  68    t = (v - v_min) / (v_max - v_min)
  69    return int(round(p_min + t * (p_max - p_min)))
  70
  71
  72def _map_pos_to_val(p: int, p_min: int, p_max: int, v_min: float, v_max: float) -> float:
  73    """Map an integer position linearly to a numeric value.
  74
  75    Args:
  76        p: Integer position to map.
  77        p_min: Minimum position of the source interval.
  78        p_max: Maximum position of the source interval.
  79        v_min: Minimum value of the destination interval.
  80        v_max: Maximum value of the destination interval.
  81
  82    Returns:
  83        Interpolated numeric value.
  84
  85    Note:
  86        If ``p_min == p_max``, the mapping is degenerate and ``v_min`` is
  87        returned.
  88    """
  89    if p_max == p_min:
  90        return v_min
  91    t = (p - p_min) / (p_max - p_min)
  92    return v_min + t * (v_max - v_min)
  93
  94
  95def make_line_edit(
  96    value_is_int: bool,
  97    init_value: TNum,
  98    fmt: str,
  99    min_limit: TNum,
 100    max_limit: TNum,
 101    min_limit_inclusive: bool,
 102    max_limit_inclusive: bool,
 103) -> NumericLineEdit:
 104    """Create a numeric line edit suitable for range-slider dialogs.
 105
 106    Args:
 107        value_is_int: Whether the editor should parse integer values.
 108        init_value: Initial value shown in the line edit.
 109        fmt: Slider display format string.
 110        min_limit: Lower allowed hard limit.
 111        max_limit: Upper allowed hard limit.
 112        min_limit_inclusive: Whether the lower limit is inclusive.
 113        max_limit_inclusive: Whether the upper limit is inclusive.
 114
 115    Returns:
 116        Configured numeric line edit widget.
 117    """
 118    val_fmt = get_numeric_format_field(fmt)
 119    return NumericLineEdit(
 120        init_val=init_value,
 121        value_is_int=value_is_int,
 122        val_fmt=val_fmt,
 123        min_limit=min_limit,
 124        max_limit=max_limit,
 125        min_limit_inclusive=min_limit_inclusive,
 126        max_limit_inclusive=max_limit_inclusive,
 127    )
 128
 129
 130class EditConfigDialog(QDialog, Generic[TNum]):
 131    """Dialog for editing a range slider's configuration."""
 132
 133    def __init__(
 134        self,
 135        range_slider_name: str,
 136        value_is_int: bool,
 137        min_val: TNum,
 138        max_val: TNum,
 139        fmt: str,
 140        min_limit: TNum | None,
 141        max_limit: TNum | None,
 142        min_limit_inclusive: bool,
 143        max_limit_inclusive: bool,
 144        show_range: bool = True,
 145        show_range_enabled: bool = True,
 146        parent: Optional[QWidget] = None,
 147    ):
 148        """Initialize the configuration dialog.
 149
 150        Args:
 151            range_slider_name: Display name of the range slider.
 152            value_is_int: Whether the slider uses integer values.
 153            min_val: Current minimum value.
 154            max_val: Current maximum value.
 155            fmt: Current display format string.
 156            min_limit: Optional lower hard limit.
 157            max_limit: Optional upper hard limit.
 158            min_limit_inclusive: Whether the lower hard limit is inclusive.
 159            max_limit_inclusive: Whether the upper hard limit is inclusive.
 160            show_range: Initial state of the range-visibility option.
 161            show_range_enabled: Whether the range-visibility option is editable.
 162            parent: Optional parent widget.
 163        """
 164        super().__init__(parent)
 165        self.setWindowTitle("Edit Configuration")
 166
 167        self._show_range = show_range
 168        self._show_range_enabled = show_range_enabled
 169        self._value_is_int = value_is_int
 170        self._edit_min = make_line_edit(
 171            value_is_int,
 172            min_val,
 173            fmt,
 174            min_limit,
 175            max_limit,
 176            min_limit_inclusive,
 177            max_limit_inclusive,
 178        )
 179        self._edit_max = make_line_edit(
 180            value_is_int,
 181            max_val,
 182            fmt,
 183            min_limit,
 184            max_limit,
 185            min_limit_inclusive,
 186            max_limit_inclusive,
 187        )
 188        self._edit_fmt = QLineEdit(fmt)
 189        self._cb_ticks = QCheckBox("Show Range", self)
 190        self._cb_ticks.setChecked(show_range)
 191        self._cb_ticks.setEnabled(show_range_enabled)
 192
 193        self._edit_fmt.editingFinished.connect(self._fmt_changed)
 194
 195        buttons = QDialogButtonBox(QDialogButtonBox.Ok | QDialogButtonBox.Cancel, parent=self)
 196        buttons.accepted.connect(self.accept)
 197        buttons.rejected.connect(self.reject)
 198
 199        form = QFormLayout(self)
 200        form.addRow("Range Slider:", SvgLabel(range_slider_name, alignment=Qt.AlignLeft | Qt.AlignVCenter))
 201        form.addRow(self._cb_ticks)
 202        form.addRow("Min:", self._edit_min)
 203        form.addRow("Max:", self._edit_max)
 204        form.addRow("Format:", self._edit_fmt)
 205        form.addRow(buttons)
 206
 207        self.setSizeGripEnabled(False)
 208        self.adjustSize()
 209        self.setFixedSize(self.size())
 210
 211    def _fmt_changed(self) -> None:
 212        """Update numeric validators after the format field changes."""
 213        fmt = get_numeric_format_field(self._edit_fmt.text())
 214        self._edit_min.set_fmt(fmt)
 215        self._edit_max.set_fmt(fmt)
 216
 217    def accept(self) -> None:
 218        """Validate the dialog state and accept it when valid."""
 219        range_min = self._edit_min.get_value()
 220        range_max = self._edit_max.get_value()
 221
 222        if range_max <= range_min:
 223            show_warning("Invalid range", "Min must be less than Max", parent=self)
 224            return
 225
 226        super().accept()
 227
 228    def get_values(self) -> Tuple[TNum, TNum, str, bool]:
 229        """Return the validated dialog values.
 230
 231        Returns:
 232            Tuple containing minimum value, maximum value, format string, and
 233            range-visibility flag.
 234        """
 235        return (
 236            self._edit_min.get_value(),
 237            self._edit_max.get_value(),
 238            self._edit_fmt.text(),
 239            self._cb_ticks.isChecked(),
 240        )
 241
 242    def showEvent(self, event: QShowEvent) -> None:
 243        """Focus the minimum editor when the dialog is shown.
 244
 245        Args:
 246            event: Qt show event.
 247        """
 248        super().showEvent(event)
 249        self._edit_min.setFocus()
 250        self._edit_min.selectAll()
 251
 252
 253class SetValuesDialog(QDialog, Generic[TNum]):
 254    """Dialog for editing a lower and upper bound pair."""
 255
 256    def __init__(
 257        self,
 258        slider_name: str,
 259        value_is_int: bool,
 260        current_lower: TNum,
 261        current_upper: TNum,
 262        fmt: str,
 263        min_limit: TNum | None,
 264        max_limit: TNum | None,
 265        min_limit_inclusive: bool,
 266        max_limit_inclusive: bool,
 267        parent: Optional[QWidget] = None,
 268    ):
 269        """Initialize the value-pair dialog.
 270
 271        Args:
 272            slider_name: Display name of the slider.
 273            value_is_int: Whether the slider uses integer values.
 274            current_lower: Current lower bound.
 275            current_upper: Current upper bound.
 276            fmt: Current display format string.
 277            min_limit: Optional lower hard limit.
 278            max_limit: Optional upper hard limit.
 279            min_limit_inclusive: Whether the lower hard limit is inclusive.
 280            max_limit_inclusive: Whether the upper hard limit is inclusive.
 281            parent: Optional parent widget.
 282        """
 283        super().__init__(parent)
 284        self.setWindowTitle("Set Values")
 285
 286        self._edit_lower = make_line_edit(
 287            value_is_int,
 288            current_lower,
 289            fmt,
 290            min_limit,
 291            max_limit,
 292            min_limit_inclusive,
 293            max_limit_inclusive,
 294        )
 295        self._edit_upper = make_line_edit(
 296            value_is_int,
 297            current_upper,
 298            fmt,
 299            min_limit,
 300            max_limit,
 301            min_limit_inclusive,
 302            max_limit_inclusive,
 303        )
 304
 305        buttons = QDialogButtonBox(QDialogButtonBox.Ok | QDialogButtonBox.Cancel, parent=self)
 306        buttons.accepted.connect(self.accept)
 307        buttons.rejected.connect(self.reject)
 308
 309        form = QFormLayout(self)
 310        form.addRow("Range Slider:", SvgLabel(slider_name, alignment=Qt.AlignLeft | Qt.AlignVCenter))
 311        form.addRow("Lower:", self._edit_lower)
 312        form.addRow("Upper:", self._edit_upper)
 313        form.addRow(buttons)
 314
 315        self.setSizeGripEnabled(False)
 316        self.adjustSize()
 317        self.setFixedSize(self.size())
 318
 319    def accept(self) -> None:
 320        """Validate the lower and upper values before accepting."""
 321        lower = self._edit_lower.get_value()
 322        upper = self._edit_upper.get_value()
 323
 324        if upper < lower:
 325            show_warning("Invalid range", "Lower must be less than or equal to upper.", parent=self)
 326            return
 327
 328        super().accept()
 329
 330    def get_values(self) -> Tuple[TNum, TNum]:
 331        """Return the validated lower and upper values.
 332
 333        Returns:
 334            Tuple containing the lower and upper values.
 335        """
 336        return self._edit_lower.get_value(), self._edit_upper.get_value()
 337
 338    def showEvent(self, event: QShowEvent) -> None:
 339        """Focus the lower editor when the dialog is shown.
 340
 341        Args:
 342            event: Qt show event.
 343        """
 344        super().showEvent(event)
 345        self._edit_lower.setFocus()
 346        self._edit_lower.selectAll()
 347
 348
 349class SetMarginsDialog(QDialog):
 350    """Dialog for editing lower and upper margin values."""
 351
 352    def __init__(
 353        self,
 354        slider_name: str,
 355        margin_lower: int,
 356        margin_upper: int,
 357        parent: Optional[QWidget] = None,
 358    ):
 359        """Initialize the margins dialog.
 360
 361        Args:
 362            slider_name: Display name of the slider.
 363            margin_lower: Current lower margin.
 364            margin_upper: Current upper margin.
 365            parent: Optional parent widget.
 366        """
 367        super().__init__(parent)
 368        self.setWindowTitle("Set Margins")
 369
 370        self._margin_lo_sb = self._build_spin_box(margin_lower)
 371        self._margin_up_sb = self._build_spin_box(margin_upper)
 372
 373        buttons = QDialogButtonBox(QDialogButtonBox.Ok | QDialogButtonBox.Cancel, parent=self)
 374        buttons.accepted.connect(self.accept)
 375        buttons.rejected.connect(self.reject)
 376
 377        form = QFormLayout(self)
 378        form.addRow("Range Slider:", SvgLabel(slider_name, alignment=Qt.AlignLeft | Qt.AlignVCenter))
 379        form.addRow("Upper:", self._margin_up_sb)
 380        form.addRow("Lower:", self._margin_lo_sb)
 381        form.addRow(buttons)
 382
 383        self.setSizeGripEnabled(False)
 384        self.adjustSize()
 385        self.setFixedSize(self.size())
 386
 387    def _build_spin_box(self, value: int) -> QSpinBox:
 388        """Create a spin box configured for margin editing.
 389
 390        Args:
 391            value: Initial spin-box value.
 392
 393        Returns:
 394            Configured spin box.
 395        """
 396        sb = QSpinBox(self)
 397        sb.setSuffix(" %")
 398        sb.setMinimum(0)
 399        sb.setMaximum(100)
 400        sb.setValue(value)
 401        sb.setFixedWidth(sb.sizeHint().width())
 402        return sb
 403
 404    def get_values(self) -> Tuple[int, int]:
 405        """Return the validated margin values.
 406
 407        Returns:
 408            Tuple containing lower and upper margins.
 409        """
 410        return self._margin_lo_sb.value(), self._margin_up_sb.value()
 411
 412    def showEvent(self, event: QShowEvent) -> None:
 413        """Focus the lower-margin editor when the dialog is shown.
 414
 415        Args:
 416            event: Qt show event.
 417        """
 418        super().showEvent(event)
 419        self._margin_lo_sb.setFocus()
 420        self._margin_lo_sb.selectAll()
 421
 422
 423class DualHandleSlider(QWidget):
 424    """Custom slider widget with independently draggable lower and upper handles."""
 425
 426    valueChanged = Signal(tuple)
 427
 428    def __init__(
 429        self,
 430        minimum=0.0,
 431        maximum=100.0,
 432        values=(20.0, 80.0),
 433        orientation=Qt.Horizontal,
 434        parent=None,
 435    ):
 436        """Initialize the dual-handle slider.
 437
 438        Args:
 439            minimum: Minimum allowed value.
 440            maximum: Maximum allowed value.
 441            values: Initial lower and upper values.
 442            orientation: Slider orientation.
 443            parent: Optional parent widget.
 444        """
 445        super().__init__(parent)
 446
 447        self._min = float(minimum)
 448        self._max = float(maximum)
 449        self._lower = float(values[0])
 450        self._upper = float(values[1])
 451        self._orientation = orientation
 452
 453        self._active_handle = None
 454        self._margin = 7
 455        self._show_ticks = False
 456        self._tick_count = 2
 457
 458        self.setMouseTracking(True)
 459
 460        if self._orientation == Qt.Horizontal:
 461            self.setMinimumSize(80, 30)
 462        else:
 463            self.setMinimumSize(30, 80)
 464
 465        self._validate()
 466
 467    def _is_horizontal(self):
 468        """Return whether the slider orientation is horizontal.
 469
 470        Returns:
 471            ``True`` for horizontal sliders, otherwise ``False``.
 472        """
 473        return self._orientation == Qt.Horizontal
 474
 475    def _pixel_min(self):
 476        """Return the minimum usable pixel coordinate along the slider."""
 477        return self._margin
 478
 479    def _pixel_max(self):
 480        """Return the maximum usable pixel coordinate along the slider."""
 481        if self._is_horizontal():
 482            return self.width() - self._margin
 483        return self.height() - self._margin
 484
 485    def _pixel_span(self):
 486        """Return the usable pixel span of the slider."""
 487        return max(1, self._pixel_max() - self._pixel_min())
 488
 489    def _value_to_pixel(self, value):
 490        """Convert a logical value to a pixel coordinate.
 491
 492        Args:
 493            value: Logical slider value.
 494
 495        Returns:
 496            Pixel coordinate along the slider axis.
 497        """
 498        value = max(self._min, min(value, self._max))
 499        frac = (value - self._min) / (self._max - self._min)
 500        return int(round(self._pixel_min() + frac * self._pixel_span()))
 501
 502    def _pixel_to_value(self, pixel):
 503        """Convert a pixel coordinate to a logical slider value.
 504
 505        Args:
 506            pixel: Pixel coordinate along the slider axis.
 507
 508        Returns:
 509            Logical slider value.
 510        """
 511        pixel = max(self._pixel_min(), min(pixel, self._pixel_max()))
 512        frac = (pixel - self._pixel_min()) / self._pixel_span()
 513        return self._min + frac * (self._max - self._min)
 514
 515    def _lower_center(self):
 516        """Return the center point of the lower handle."""
 517        if self._is_horizontal():
 518            return QPoint(self._value_to_pixel(self._lower), self.height() // 2)
 519        return QPoint(self.width() // 2, self._value_to_pixel(self._lower))
 520
 521    def _upper_center(self):
 522        """Return the center point of the upper handle."""
 523        if self._is_horizontal():
 524            return QPoint(self._value_to_pixel(self._upper), self.height() // 2)
 525        return QPoint(self.width() // 2, self._value_to_pixel(self._upper))
 526
 527    def _style_option(self, value: float) -> QStyleOptionSlider:
 528        """Build a style option describing a handle at a given value.
 529
 530        Args:
 531            value: Logical slider value.
 532
 533        Returns:
 534            Configured style option.
 535        """
 536        opt = QStyleOptionSlider()
 537        opt.initFrom(self)
 538        opt.orientation = self._orientation
 539        opt.minimum = 0
 540        opt.maximum = 10000
 541
 542        pos = self._value_to_style_pos(value)
 543        opt.sliderPosition = pos
 544        opt.sliderValue = pos
 545        opt.upsideDown = self._orientation == Qt.Vertical
 546        opt.subControls = QStyle.SC_SliderGroove | QStyle.SC_SliderHandle
 547        return opt
 548
 549    def _handle_rect(self, value: float) -> QRect:
 550        """Return the handle rectangle for a given value.
 551
 552        Args:
 553            value: Logical slider value.
 554
 555        Returns:
 556            Handle rectangle in widget coordinates.
 557        """
 558        opt = self._style_option(value)
 559        return self.style().subControlRect(QStyle.CC_Slider, opt, QStyle.SC_SliderHandle, self)
 560
 561    def _value_to_style_pos(self, value: float) -> int:
 562        """Convert a logical value to the style system's slider position.
 563
 564        Args:
 565            value: Logical slider value.
 566
 567        Returns:
 568            Style slider position in the range [0, 10000].
 569        """
 570        frac = (value - self._min) / (self._max - self._min)
 571        return int(round(frac * 10000))
 572
 573    def _style_pos_to_value(self, pos: int) -> float:
 574        """Convert a style slider position to a logical value.
 575
 576        Args:
 577            pos: Style slider position.
 578
 579        Returns:
 580            Logical slider value.
 581        """
 582        frac = pos / 10000.0
 583        return self._min + frac * (self._max - self._min)
 584
 585    def _hit_test(self, pos):
 586        """Return which handle contains the given point.
 587
 588        Args:
 589            pos: Mouse position in widget coordinates.
 590
 591        Returns:
 592            ``"lower"``, ``"upper"``, or ``None``.
 593        """
 594        lower_rect = self._handle_rect(self._lower)
 595        upper_rect = self._handle_rect(self._upper)
 596
 597        in_lower = lower_rect.contains(pos)
 598        in_upper = upper_rect.contains(pos)
 599
 600        if in_lower and in_upper:
 601            if self._is_horizontal():
 602                dl = abs(pos.x() - lower_rect.center().x())
 603                du = abs(pos.x() - upper_rect.center().x())
 604            else:
 605                dl = abs(pos.y() - lower_rect.center().y())
 606                du = abs(pos.y() - upper_rect.center().y())
 607            return "lower" if dl <= du else "upper"
 608
 609        if in_lower:
 610            return "lower"
 611        if in_upper:
 612            return "upper"
 613        return None
 614
 615    def _pos_along_slider(self, pos):
 616        """Return the position projected onto the slider axis.
 617
 618        Args:
 619            pos: Mouse position in widget coordinates.
 620
 621        Returns:
 622            Coordinate along the logical slider axis.
 623        """
 624        return pos.x() if self._is_horizontal() else self._pixel_max() - pos.y()
 625
 626    def _closest_handle(self, pos):
 627        """Return the handle closest to a point.
 628
 629        Args:
 630            pos: Mouse position in widget coordinates.
 631
 632        Returns:
 633            ``"lower"`` or ``"upper"``.
 634        """
 635        p = self._pos_along_slider(pos)
 636
 637        lower_center = self._handle_rect(self._lower).center()
 638        upper_center = self._handle_rect(self._upper).center()
 639
 640        lower_p = lower_center.x() if self._is_horizontal() else -lower_center.y()
 641        upper_p = upper_center.x() if self._is_horizontal() else -upper_center.y()
 642
 643        dl = abs(p - lower_p)
 644        du = abs(p - upper_p)
 645
 646        return "lower" if dl <= du else "upper"
 647
 648    def _clamp_pixel(self, pixel: int):
 649        """Clamp a dragged handle to a valid pixel position.
 650
 651        Args:
 652            pixel: Proposed pixel position along the slider axis.
 653        """
 654        if self._active_handle == "lower":
 655            p_up = self._value_to_pixel(self._upper)
 656            new_p = max(self._pixel_min(), min(pixel, p_up - 1))
 657            self.setValues((self._pixel_to_value(new_p), self._upper))
 658        else:
 659            p_lo = self._value_to_pixel(self._lower)
 660            new_p = min(self._pixel_max(), max(pixel, p_lo + 1))
 661            self.setValues((self._lower, self._pixel_to_value(new_p)))
 662
 663    def _draw_ticks(self, painter, groove_rect):
 664        """Draw tick marks along the slider groove.
 665
 666        Args:
 667            painter: Painter used for drawing.
 668            groove_rect: Groove rectangle in widget coordinates.
 669        """
 670        if not self._show_ticks:
 671            return
 672        painter.save()
 673        pen = painter.pen()
 674        c = self.palette().color(QPalette.Disabled, QPalette.WindowText)
 675        pen.setColor(c)
 676        painter.setPen(pen)
 677
 678        n = max(2, self._tick_count)
 679
 680        if self._is_horizontal():
 681            y1 = groove_rect.bottom() + 6
 682            y2 = y1 + 3
 683
 684            for i in range(n):
 685                frac = i / (n - 1)
 686                x = int(round(self._pixel_min() + frac * self._pixel_span()))
 687                painter.drawLine(x, y1, x, y2)
 688        else:
 689            x1 = groove_rect.right() + 6
 690            x2 = x1 + 3
 691
 692            for i in range(n):
 693                frac = i / (n - 1)
 694                y = int(round(self._pixel_max() - frac * self._pixel_span()))
 695                painter.drawLine(x1, y, x2, y)
 696        painter.restore()
 697
 698    def _validate(self):
 699        """Validate the configured slider range."""
 700        if self._max <= self._min:
 701            raise ValueError("maximum must be greater than minimum")
 702
 703    def values(self):
 704        """Return the current lower and upper values.
 705
 706        Returns:
 707            Tuple containing lower and upper slider values.
 708        """
 709        return self._lower, self._upper
 710
 711    def setValues(self, values):
 712        """Set the current lower and upper values.
 713
 714        Args:
 715            values: Tuple containing lower and upper values.
 716        """
 717        new_vals = (float(values[0]), float(values[1]))
 718        old_vals = (self._lower, self._upper)
 719        self._lower, self._upper = new_vals
 720        self.update()
 721        if new_vals != old_vals:
 722            self.valueChanged.emit(new_vals)
 723
 724    def setRange(self, minimum, maximum):
 725        """Set the allowed slider range.
 726
 727        Args:
 728            minimum: New minimum value.
 729            maximum: New maximum value.
 730        """
 731        self._min = float(minimum)
 732        self._max = float(maximum)
 733        self.setValues((self._lower, self._upper))
 734
 735    def orientation(self):
 736        """Return the slider orientation."""
 737        return self._orientation
 738
 739    def setShowTicks(self, state: bool):
 740        """Enable or disable tick rendering.
 741
 742        Args:
 743            state: Whether ticks should be drawn.
 744        """
 745        self._show_ticks = bool(state)
 746        self.update()
 747
 748    def setTickCount(self, count: int):
 749        """Set the number of ticks drawn on the slider.
 750
 751        Args:
 752            count: Desired tick count.
 753        """
 754        self._tick_count = max(2, int(count))
 755        self.update()
 756
 757    def mousePressEvent(self, event):
 758        """Handle the Qt mouse press callback.
 759
 760        Args:
 761            event: Qt mouse event.
 762        """
 763        if event.button() != Qt.LeftButton:
 764            return super().mousePressEvent(event)
 765
 766        pos = event.position().toPoint()
 767        handle = self._hit_test(pos)
 768
 769        if handle is None:
 770            handle = self._closest_handle(pos)
 771
 772        self._active_handle = handle
 773        pixel = self._pos_along_slider(pos)
 774        self._clamp_pixel(pixel)
 775        event.accept()
 776
 777    def mouseMoveEvent(self, event):
 778        """Handle the Qt mouse move callback.
 779
 780        Args:
 781            event: Qt mouse event.
 782        """
 783        if self._active_handle is None:
 784            return super().mouseMoveEvent(event)
 785
 786        p = event.position().toPoint()
 787        pixel = p.x() if self._is_horizontal() else self._pixel_max() - p.y()
 788        self._clamp_pixel(pixel)
 789        event.accept()
 790
 791    def mouseReleaseEvent(self, event):
 792        """Handle the Qt mouse release callback.
 793
 794        Args:
 795            event: Qt mouse event.
 796        """
 797        self._active_handle = None
 798        event.accept()
 799
 800    def paintEvent(self, event):
 801        """Paint the groove, active span, ticks, and both handles.
 802
 803        Args:
 804            event: Qt paint event.
 805        """
 806        painter = QStylePainter(self)
 807        style = self.style()
 808
 809        lower_opt = self._style_option(self._lower)
 810        upper_opt = self._style_option(self._upper)
 811
 812        groove_rect = style.subControlRect(QStyle.CC_Slider, lower_opt, QStyle.SC_SliderGroove, self)
 813        lower_handle_rect = style.subControlRect(QStyle.CC_Slider, lower_opt, QStyle.SC_SliderHandle, self)
 814        upper_handle_rect = style.subControlRect(QStyle.CC_Slider, upper_opt, QStyle.SC_SliderHandle, self)
 815
 816        base_opt = self._style_option(self._min)
 817        base_opt.subControls = QStyle.SC_SliderGroove
 818
 819        painter.save()
 820        painter.setClipRect(groove_rect.adjusted(-1, -1, 1, 1))
 821        painter.drawComplexControl(QStyle.CC_Slider, base_opt)
 822        painter.restore()
 823
 824        if self.isEnabled():
 825            if self._is_horizontal():
 826                left = lower_handle_rect.center().x()
 827                right = upper_handle_rect.center().x()
 828
 829                if right > left:
 830                    active_opt = self._style_option(self._upper)
 831                    active_opt.subControls = QStyle.SC_SliderGroove
 832
 833                    painter.save()
 834                    painter.setClipRect(
 835                        QRect(
 836                            left,
 837                            groove_rect.top() - 2,
 838                            right - left + 1,
 839                            groove_rect.height() + 4,
 840                        )
 841                    )
 842                    painter.drawComplexControl(QStyle.CC_Slider, active_opt)
 843                    painter.restore()
 844            else:
 845                top = upper_handle_rect.center().y()
 846                bottom = lower_handle_rect.center().y()
 847
 848                if bottom > top:
 849                    active_opt = self._style_option(self._upper)
 850                    active_opt.subControls = QStyle.SC_SliderGroove
 851
 852                    painter.save()
 853                    painter.setClipRect(
 854                        QRect(
 855                            groove_rect.left() - 2,
 856                            top,
 857                            groove_rect.width() + 4,
 858                            bottom - top + 1,
 859                        )
 860                    )
 861                    painter.drawComplexControl(QStyle.CC_Slider, active_opt)
 862                    painter.restore()
 863
 864        self._draw_ticks(painter, groove_rect)
 865
 866        lower_handle_opt = self._style_option(self._lower)
 867        lower_handle_opt.subControls = QStyle.SC_SliderHandle
 868        if self._active_handle == "lower" and self.isEnabled():
 869            lower_handle_opt.activeSubControls = QStyle.SC_SliderHandle
 870            lower_handle_opt.state |= QStyle.State_Sunken
 871        painter.drawComplexControl(QStyle.CC_Slider, lower_handle_opt)
 872
 873        upper_handle_opt = self._style_option(self._upper)
 874        upper_handle_opt.subControls = QStyle.SC_SliderHandle
 875        if self._active_handle == "upper" and self.isEnabled():
 876            upper_handle_opt.activeSubControls = QStyle.SC_SliderHandle
 877            upper_handle_opt.state |= QStyle.State_Sunken
 878        painter.drawComplexControl(QStyle.CC_Slider, upper_handle_opt)
 879
 880
 881class RangeMarkerOverlay(QWidget):
 882    """Transparent overlay that draws two default markers for a range slider."""
 883
 884    def __init__(
 885        self,
 886        slider: "DualHandleSlider",
 887        lower_value_fn,
 888        upper_value_fn,
 889        *,
 890        thickness: int = 2,
 891        color: QColor | str = Qt.red,
 892    ):
 893        """Initialize the range-marker overlay.
 894
 895        Args:
 896            slider: Target dual-handle slider.
 897            lower_value_fn: Callable returning the lower marker value.
 898            upper_value_fn: Callable returning the upper marker value.
 899            thickness: Marker line thickness in pixels.
 900            color: Marker color.
 901        """
 902        super().__init__(slider)
 903        self._slider = slider
 904        self._lower_value_fn = lower_value_fn
 905        self._upper_value_fn = upper_value_fn
 906        self._thickness = thickness
 907        self._color = QColor(color)
 908
 909        self.setAttribute(Qt.WA_TransparentForMouseEvents, True)
 910        self.setAttribute(Qt.WA_NoSystemBackground, True)
 911        self.setAttribute(Qt.WA_TranslucentBackground, True)
 912
 913        slider.installEventFilter(self)
 914        self._sync_geometry()
 915        self.show()
 916
 917    def _current_color(self):
 918        """Return the effective marker color for the current enabled state."""
 919        c = QColor(self._color)
 920        if not self._slider.isEnabled():
 921            ref = self.palette().color(QPalette.Disabled, QPalette.WindowText)
 922            c.setAlphaF(ref.alphaF())
 923        return c
 924
 925    def eventFilter(self, obj: QObject, ev: QEvent) -> bool:
 926        """Synchronize overlay state when the target slider changes.
 927
 928        Args:
 929            obj: Watched object.
 930            ev: Event delivered to the watched object.
 931
 932        Returns:
 933            Result of the base-class event filter.
 934        """
 935        if obj is self._slider and ev.type() in (
 936            QEvent.Resize,
 937            QEvent.Show,
 938            QEvent.Hide,
 939            QEvent.EnabledChange,
 940        ):
 941            self._sync_geometry()
 942            self.update()
 943        return super().eventFilter(obj, ev)
 944
 945    def _sync_geometry(self) -> None:
 946        """Synchronize geometry and visibility with the target slider."""
 947        self.setGeometry(self._slider.rect())
 948        self.setVisible(self._slider.isVisible())
 949
 950    def _draw_one_marker(self, painter: QPainter, value: float) -> None:
 951        """Draw a single marker line.
 952
 953        Args:
 954            painter: Painter used for drawing.
 955            value: Logical slider value at which to draw the marker.
 956        """
 957        groove_rect = self._slider.style().subControlRect(
 958            QStyle.CC_Slider,
 959            self._slider._style_option(value),
 960            QStyle.SC_SliderGroove,
 961            self._slider,
 962        )
 963        handle_rect = self._slider._handle_rect(value)
 964
 965        if groove_rect.isNull() or handle_rect.isNull():
 966            return
 967
 968        c = handle_rect.center()
 969        if self._slider.orientation() == Qt.Horizontal:
 970            painter.drawLine(c.x(), groove_rect.top(), c.x(), groove_rect.bottom())
 971        else:
 972            painter.drawLine(groove_rect.left(), c.y(), groove_rect.right(), c.y())
 973
 974    def paintEvent(self, _ev) -> None:
 975        """Paint both default markers.
 976
 977        Args:
 978            _ev: Qt paint event.
 979        """
 980        p = QPainter(self)
 981        p.setRenderHint(QPainter.Antialiasing, False)
 982
 983        pen = QPen(self._current_color())
 984        pen.setWidth(self._thickness)
 985        p.setPen(pen)
 986
 987        self._draw_one_marker(p, float(self._lower_value_fn()))
 988        self._draw_one_marker(p, float(self._upper_value_fn()))
 989        p.end()
 990
 991
 992class LabeledRangeSliderBase(ParameterWidgetBase[tuple], Generic[TNum]):
 993    """Base widget for labeled range sliders built on ``DualHandleSlider``."""
 994
 995    def __init__(
 996        self,
 997        label: str,
 998        unit: str,
 999        min_val: TNum,
1000        max_val: TNum,
1001        init_vals: Tuple[TNum, TNum],
1002        orientation: Qt.Orientation,
1003        val_fmt: str,
1004        show_range: bool,
1005        parent: Optional[QWidget],
1006    ):
1007        """Initialize the labeled range-slider base widget.
1008
1009        Args:
1010            label: Slider label text.
1011            unit: Optional unit label.
1012            min_val: Initial minimum value.
1013            max_val: Initial maximum value.
1014            init_vals: Initial lower and upper values.
1015            orientation: Slider orientation.
1016            val_fmt: Value display format string.
1017            show_range: Whether range labels and ticks should be shown.
1018            parent: Optional parent widget.
1019        """
1020        super().__init__(parent)
1021
1022        self.setObjectName("labeled_slider")
1023        self.setAttribute(Qt.WA_StyledBackground, True)
1024        self.setStyleSheet(SLIDER_BORDER_STYLE_SHEET)
1025        self.set_border(SliderBorderState.OFF)
1026
1027        self._label_text = label
1028        self._min_value = min_val
1029        self._max_value = max_val
1030        self._orient = orientation
1031        self._show_range = show_range
1032        self._value_fmt = val_fmt
1033        self._eval_fmt = ""
1034        self._update_eval_fmt()
1035        self._use_sci_html = False
1036        self._right_click_enable = True
1037
1038        if init_vals is None:
1039            span = max_val - min_val
1040            lo, hi = (
1041                self.evaluate_value(min_val + 0.25 * span),
1042                self.evaluate_value(min_val + 0.75 * span),
1043            )
1044        else:
1045            lo = self.evaluate_value(init_vals[0])
1046            hi = self.evaluate_value(init_vals[1])
1047
1048        if hi < lo:
1049            lo, hi = hi, lo
1050
1051        self._current_lower = lo
1052        self._current_upper = hi
1053        self._default_lower = lo
1054        self._default_upper = hi
1055
1056        self._name_label = SvgLabel(label, parent=self, font_size=SLIDER_LABEL_SIZE)
1057        self._value_wrap = QWidget(self)
1058        self._value_l_label = self._make_value_label("[")
1059        self._value_lo_label = self._make_value_label("")
1060        self._value_c_label = self._make_value_label(", ")
1061        self._value_hi_label = self._make_value_label("")
1062        self._value_r_label = self._make_value_label("]")
1063        hl = QHBoxLayout(self._value_wrap)
1064        hl.setContentsMargins(0, 0, 0, 0)
1065        hl.setSpacing(0)
1066        hl.addWidget(self._value_l_label)
1067        hl.addWidget(self._value_lo_label)
1068        hl.addWidget(self._value_c_label)
1069        hl.addWidget(self._value_hi_label)
1070        hl.addWidget(self._value_r_label)
1071        if unit:
1072            self._unit_label = SvgLabel(f"({unit})", parent=self, fix_size=True, font_size=UNIT_LABEL_SIZE)
1073            hl.addWidget(self._unit_label)
1074        hl.addStretch(1)
1075        self._min_label = QLabel()
1076        self._max_label = QLabel()
1077        self._min_label.setObjectName("slider_range")
1078        self._max_label.setObjectName("slider_range")
1079
1080        self._slider = DualHandleSlider(
1081            minimum=float(min_val),
1082            maximum=float(max_val),
1083            values=(float(lo), float(hi)),
1084            orientation=orientation,
1085            parent=self,
1086        )
1087
1088        self._default_red_marker = RangeMarkerOverlay(
1089            self._slider,
1090            lower_value_fn=lambda: float(self._default_lower),
1091            upper_value_fn=lambda: float(self._default_upper),
1092            thickness=2,
1093        )
1094
1095        self._right_click_overlay = RightClickOverlay(
1096            target_widget=self._slider,
1097            owner_widget=self,
1098            parent=self,
1099        )
1100        self._right_click_overlay.hide()
1101
1102        self._right_click_items: List[Dict[str, Any]] = [
1103            {"id": "save_as_default", "text": "Save as Default"},
1104            {"id": "reset_to_default", "text": "Reset to Default"},
1105        ]
1106
1107        self._name_width = self._name_label.sizeHint().width()
1108        self._value_width = 0
1109
1110        self.set_format(val_fmt)
1111        self._make_layout()
1112
1113    def _make_value_label(self, text: str) -> QLabel:
1114        """Create a QLabel used in the formatted range display.
1115
1116        Args:
1117            text: Initial label text.
1118
1119        Returns:
1120            Configured value label.
1121        """
1122        l = QLabel(text)
1123        l.setObjectName("slider_value")
1124        return l
1125
1126    def _make_layout(self):
1127        """Build the widget layout for the current orientation."""
1128        gl = QGridLayout(self)
1129        gl.setContentsMargins(0, 0, 0, 0)
1130
1131        slider_wrap = QWidget()
1132        vl = QVBoxLayout(slider_wrap)
1133        vl.setContentsMargins(0, 0, 0, 0)
1134        vl.setSpacing(0)
1135        vl.addWidget(self._slider)
1136
1137        if self._orient == Qt.Horizontal:
1138            gl.setVerticalSpacing(0)
1139            com = Qt.AlignVCenter
1140
1141            self._name_label.setAlignment(com | Qt.AlignRight)
1142
1143            self._value_l_label.setAlignment(com)
1144            self._value_lo_label.setAlignment(com | Qt.AlignLeft)
1145            self._value_c_label.setAlignment(com)
1146            self._value_hi_label.setAlignment(com | Qt.AlignLeft)
1147            self._value_r_label.setAlignment(com)
1148
1149            gl.addWidget(self._name_label, 0, 0, com | Qt.AlignRight)
1150            gl.addWidget(slider_wrap, 0, 1, 1, 3, com)
1151            gl.addWidget(self._value_wrap, 0, 4, com | Qt.AlignLeft)
1152            gl.addWidget(self._min_label, 1, 1)
1153            gl.addWidget(self._max_label, 1, 3)
1154
1155            self.setSizePolicy(QSizePolicy.Expanding, QSizePolicy.Fixed)
1156            gl.setColumnStretch(2, 1)
1157        else:
1158            gl.setHorizontalSpacing(0)
1159            gl.setVerticalSpacing(2)
1160            com = Qt.AlignHCenter
1161
1162            self._value_l_label.setAlignment(com | Qt.AlignVCenter)
1163            self._value_lo_label.setAlignment(Qt.AlignLeft | Qt.AlignVCenter)
1164            self._value_c_label.setAlignment(com | Qt.AlignVCenter)
1165            self._value_hi_label.setAlignment(Qt.AlignLeft | Qt.AlignVCenter)
1166            self._value_r_label.setAlignment(com | Qt.AlignVCenter)
1167
1168            self._name_label.setAlignment(com | Qt.AlignTop)
1169
1170            self._max_label.setContentsMargins(5, 0, 0, 0)
1171            self._min_label.setContentsMargins(5, 0, 0, 1)
1172
1173            gl.addWidget(self._value_wrap, 0, 0, 1, 3, com | Qt.AlignBottom)
1174            gl.addWidget(slider_wrap, 1, 1, 3, 1, com)
1175            gl.addWidget(self._name_label, 4, 0, 1, 3, com | Qt.AlignTop)
1176            gl.addWidget(self._max_label, 1, 2, 1, 2)
1177            gl.addWidget(self._min_label, 3, 2, 1, 2)
1178
1179            self.setSizePolicy(QSizePolicy.Fixed, QSizePolicy.Expanding)
1180            gl.setRowStretch(2, 1)
1181
1182        self._gl = gl
1183        self._vl = vl
1184        self._right_click_overlay.sync_to_target()
1185
1186    def evaluate_value(self, value: TNum) -> TNum:
1187        """Normalize a value according to the current evaluation format.
1188
1189        Args:
1190            value: Value to normalize.
1191
1192        Returns:
1193            Normalized typed value.
1194        """
1195        raise NotImplementedError
1196
1197    def _value_to_text(self, value: TNum) -> str:
1198        """Format a single value for display.
1199
1200        Args:
1201            value: Value to format.
1202
1203        Returns:
1204            Formatted display text.
1205        """
1206        return value_to_text(value=value, fmt=self._value_fmt)
1207
1208    def _range_to_text(self, values: Tuple[TNum, TNum]) -> str:
1209        """Format a lower/upper pair for display.
1210
1211        Args:
1212            values: Pair of lower and upper values.
1213
1214        Returns:
1215            Formatted range string.
1216        """
1217        lo, hi = values
1218        return f"[{self._value_to_text(lo)} , {self._value_to_text(hi)}]"
1219
1220    def _update_eval_fmt(self) -> None:
1221        """Update the internal evaluation format from the display format."""
1222        self._eval_fmt = get_numeric_format_field(self._value_fmt)
1223
1224    def _update_value_label(self) -> None:
1225        """Refresh the lower and upper value labels."""
1226        self._value_lo_label.setText(self._value_to_text(self._current_lower))
1227        self._value_hi_label.setText(self._value_to_text(self._current_upper))
1228
1229    def _update_all_labels(self) -> None:
1230        """Refresh value and range labels."""
1231        self._update_value_label()
1232        self._min_label.setText(self._value_to_text(self._min_value))
1233        self._max_label.setText(self._value_to_text(self._max_value))
1234
1235    def _iter_width_values(self, max_samples: int = 200) -> list[TNum]:
1236        """Generate representative values for width measurement.
1237
1238        Args:
1239            max_samples: Maximum number of samples to generate.
1240
1241        Returns:
1242            List of representative values.
1243        """
1244        a = self.evaluate_value(self._min_value)
1245        b = self.evaluate_value(self._max_value)
1246
1247        if self.value_is_int:
1248            mn = int(a)
1249            mx = int(b)
1250            span = mx - mn
1251            if span <= max_samples:
1252                return [self.evaluate_value(v) for v in range(mn, mx + 1)]
1253
1254            vals = {
1255                mn,
1256                mx,
1257                int(self._current_lower),
1258                int(self._current_upper),
1259                int(self._default_lower),
1260                int(self._default_upper),
1261            }
1262
1263            n_lin = min(max_samples - len(vals), 100)
1264            for k in range(1, n_lin + 1):
1265                vals.add(mn + (span * k) // (n_lin + 1))
1266
1267            rng = random.Random(0)
1268            max_tries = 10 * max_samples
1269            tries = 0
1270            while len(vals) < max_samples and tries < max_tries:
1271                vals.add(rng.randint(mn, mx))
1272                tries += 1
1273
1274            return [self.evaluate_value(v) for v in sorted(vals)]
1275
1276        vals = []
1277        seen = set()
1278
1279        def add(v):
1280            """Add a value if its formatted representation is new."""
1281            v = self.evaluate_value(v)
1282            key = self._value_to_text(v)
1283            if key not in seen:
1284                seen.add(key)
1285                vals.append(v)
1286
1287        special = [
1288            a,
1289            b,
1290            self._current_lower,
1291            self._current_upper,
1292            self._default_lower,
1293            self._default_upper,
1294        ]
1295        for v in special:
1296            add(v)
1297
1298        n_lin = min(max_samples, 100)
1299        if n_lin > 0:
1300            for k in range(n_lin + 1):
1301                frac = k / n_lin
1302                add(a + frac * (b - a))
1303
1304        rng = random.Random(0)
1305        max_tries = 20 * max_samples
1306        tries = 0
1307        while len(vals) < max_samples and tries < max_tries:
1308            add(rng.uniform(a, b))
1309            tries += 1
1310
1311        return vals
1312
1313    def _update_value_width(self) -> None:
1314        """Measure and cache the width required by the formatted range display."""
1315        old_w = self._value_width
1316        l = self._value_lo_label
1317        l.ensurePolished()
1318        fmt = l.textFormat()
1319        values = self._iter_width_values(max_samples=200)
1320
1321        value_w = 0
1322        if fmt == Qt.PlainText:
1323            fm = QFontMetrics(l.font())
1324            for v in values:
1325                text = self._value_to_text(v)
1326                value_w = max(value_w, fm.horizontalAdvance(text))
1327        else:
1328            doc = QTextDocument()
1329            doc.setDefaultFont(l.font())
1330            doc.setTextWidth(-1)
1331            if self._orient == Qt.Horizontal:
1332                doc.setDocumentMargin(0)
1333            for v in values:
1334                html = self._value_to_text(v)
1335                doc.setHtml(html)
1336                value_w = max(value_w, int(doc.idealWidth()))
1337
1338        self._value_lo_label.setFixedWidth(value_w)
1339        self._value_hi_label.setFixedWidth(value_w)
1340        new_w = self._value_wrap.sizeHint().width()
1341
1342        self._value_width = new_w
1343        self._update_layout()
1344        if old_w != new_w:
1345            self.valueWidthChanged.emit(new_w)
1346
1347    def _update_layout(self):
1348        """Apply range-label visibility and width constraints."""
1349        show_range = self._show_range
1350
1351        if show_range:
1352            self._slider.setShowTicks(True)
1353            self._max_label.show()
1354            self._min_label.show()
1355        else:
1356            self._slider.setShowTicks(False)
1357            self._max_label.hide()
1358            self._min_label.hide()
1359
1360        if self._orient == Qt.Horizontal:
1361            self._vl.setContentsMargins(0, 3 if show_range else 0, 0, 0)
1362            self._gl.setColumnMinimumWidth(0, self._name_width)
1363            self._gl.setColumnMinimumWidth(4, self._value_width)
1364        else:
1365            self._vl.setContentsMargins(3 if show_range else 0, 0, 0, 0)
1366            width = max(self._name_width, self._value_width)
1367            slider_width = self._vl.sizeHint().width()
1368
1369            self._gl.setColumnMinimumWidth(0, max(10, (width - slider_width) // 2))
1370            self._gl.setColumnMinimumWidth(1, slider_width)
1371            self._gl.setColumnMinimumWidth(2, max(10, (width - slider_width) // 2))
1372
1373        self._gl.invalidate()
1374        widget = self._gl.parentWidget()
1375        if widget:
1376            widget.updateGeometry()
1377        self._right_click_overlay.sync_to_target()
1378
1379    def _on_slider_values_changed(self, vals: Tuple[float, float]) -> None:
1380        """Handle lower/upper changes from the dual-handle slider.
1381
1382        Args:
1383            vals: New lower and upper values from the internal slider.
1384        """
1385        lo = self.evaluate_value(vals[0])
1386        hi = self.evaluate_value(vals[1])
1387
1388        if hi <= lo:
1389            self._slider.setValues((self._current_lower, self._current_upper))
1390        elif lo != self._current_lower or hi != self._current_upper:
1391            self._current_lower = lo
1392            self._current_upper = hi
1393            self._update_value_label()
1394            self.valueChanged.emit(self.get_value())
1395
1396    def _set_right_click_item_checked(self, act_id, checked: bool) -> bool:
1397        """Update the stored checked state of a context-menu item.
1398
1399        Args:
1400            act_id: Menu item identifier.
1401            checked: Checked state to store.
1402
1403        Returns:
1404            ``True`` if the item was found, otherwise ``False``.
1405        """
1406        if not self._right_click_items:
1407            return False
1408
1409        for item in self._right_click_items:
1410            if item.get("id") == "sep":
1411                continue
1412            if item.get("id") == act_id:
1413                item["checkable"] = bool(item.get("checkable", True))
1414                item["checked"] = bool(checked)
1415                return True
1416
1417        return False
1418
1419    def _set_right_click_item_enabled(self, act_id, enabled: bool) -> bool:
1420        """Update the stored enabled state of a context-menu item.
1421
1422        Args:
1423            act_id: Menu item identifier.
1424            enabled: Enabled state to store.
1425
1426        Returns:
1427            ``True`` if the item was found, otherwise ``False``.
1428        """
1429        if not self._right_click_items:
1430            return False
1431
1432        for item in self._right_click_items:
1433            if item.get("id") == "sep":
1434                continue
1435            if item.get("id") == act_id:
1436                item["enabled"] = bool(enabled)
1437                return True
1438
1439        return False
1440
1441    def _right_click_requested(self, item_id, checked: bool) -> None:
1442        """Dispatch common context-menu actions.
1443
1444        Args:
1445            item_id: Triggered menu item identifier.
1446            checked: Checked state associated with the action.
1447        """
1448        if item_id == "save_as_default":
1449            self.save_current_value_as_default_value()
1450        elif item_id == "reset_to_default":
1451            self._reset_to_default_value()
1452
1453    def save_current_value_as_default_value(self):
1454        """Store the current lower and upper values as defaults."""
1455        self._default_lower = self._current_lower
1456        self._default_upper = self._current_upper
1457        self.blockSignals(True)
1458        try:
1459            self._reset_to_default_value()
1460        finally:
1461            self.blockSignals(False)
1462        self.defaultChanged.emit((self._default_lower, self._default_upper))
1463
1464    def _reset_to_default_value(self) -> None:
1465        """Restore the default lower and upper values."""
1466        self._slider.setValues((float(self._default_lower), float(self._default_upper)))
1467
1468    def get_value_width(self) -> int:
1469        """Return the cached width of the value display.
1470
1471        Returns:
1472            Width in pixels.
1473        """
1474        self.blockSignals(True)
1475        self._update_value_width()
1476        self.blockSignals(False)
1477        return self._value_width
1478
1479    def get_value(self) -> Tuple[TNum, TNum]:
1480        """Return the current lower and upper values.
1481
1482        Returns:
1483            Tuple containing lower and upper values.
1484        """
1485        return self._current_lower, self._current_upper
1486
1487    def set_format(self, val_fmt: str) -> None:
1488        """Set the display format used for the range values.
1489
1490        Args:
1491            val_fmt: New display format string.
1492        """
1493        self._value_fmt = val_fmt
1494        self._update_eval_fmt()
1495
1496        self._current_lower = self.evaluate_value(self._current_lower)
1497        self._current_upper = self.evaluate_value(self._current_upper)
1498        self._default_lower = self.evaluate_value(self._default_lower)
1499        self._default_upper = self.evaluate_value(self._default_upper)
1500        self._min_value = self.evaluate_value(self._min_value)
1501        self._max_value = self.evaluate_value(self._max_value)
1502
1503        self._use_sci_html = bool(re.search(r"\{:[0-9]*\.(\d+)S\}", val_fmt))
1504        text_fmt = Qt.RichText if self._use_sci_html else Qt.PlainText
1505        self._value_lo_label.setTextFormat(text_fmt)
1506        self._value_hi_label.setTextFormat(text_fmt)
1507        self._min_label.setTextFormat(text_fmt)
1508        self._max_label.setTextFormat(text_fmt)
1509
1510    def set_border(self, state: SliderBorderState) -> None:
1511        """Set the visual border state of the widget.
1512
1513        Args:
1514            state: Border state enum value.
1515        """
1516        state = state.value
1517        self.setProperty("borderState", state)
1518        self.style().unpolish(self)
1519        self.style().polish(self)
1520        self.update()
1521
1522    def set_right_click_enabled(self, state: bool) -> None:
1523        """Enable or disable the context menu.
1524
1525        Args:
1526            state: Whether right-click actions should be enabled.
1527        """
1528        self._right_click_enable = state
1529
1530    def set_label(self, label: str) -> None:
1531        """Set the displayed label text.
1532
1533        Args:
1534            label: New label text.
1535        """
1536        self._name_label.set_text(label)
1537        self._name_width = self._name_label.sizeHint().width()
1538        self.nameWidthChanged.emit(self._name_width)
1539
1540    def _show_context_menu(self, global_pos) -> None:
1541        """Build and show the context menu.
1542
1543        Args:
1544            global_pos: Global screen position where the menu should open.
1545        """
1546        if not self._right_click_enable:
1547            return
1548        if not self._right_click_items:
1549            return
1550
1551        self.set_border(SliderBorderState.NORMAL)
1552        QApplication.processEvents()
1553        try:
1554            menu = QMenu()
1555            item_by_id = {}
1556
1557            for item in self._right_click_items:
1558                act_id = item.get("id")
1559                if act_id == "sep":
1560                    menu.addSeparator()
1561                    continue
1562
1563                text = str(item.get("text", act_id if act_id is not None else "None"))
1564                enabled = bool(item.get("enabled", True))
1565                checkable = bool(item.get("checkable", False))
1566                checked = bool(item.get("checked", False))
1567
1568                act = menu.addAction(text)
1569                act.setEnabled(enabled)
1570                act.setCheckable(checkable)
1571                if checkable:
1572                    act.setChecked(checked)
1573                act.setData(act_id)
1574                item_by_id[act_id] = item
1575
1576            action = menu.exec(global_pos)
1577            if action is None:
1578                return
1579
1580            act_id = action.data()
1581            if act_id is None:
1582                act_id = action.text()
1583
1584            new_checked = False
1585            if action.isCheckable():
1586                old_checked = bool(item_by_id.get(act_id, {}).get("checked", action.isChecked()))
1587                new_checked = bool(action.isChecked())
1588
1589                if new_checked == old_checked:
1590                    new_checked = not old_checked
1591                    action.setChecked(new_checked)
1592
1593                if act_id in item_by_id:
1594                    item_by_id[act_id]["checked"] = new_checked
1595
1596            self._right_click_requested(act_id, new_checked)
1597        finally:
1598            self.set_border(SliderBorderState.OFF)
1599            QApplication.processEvents()
1600
1601    def contextMenuEvent(self, event) -> None:
1602        """Handle the Qt context-menu callback.
1603
1604        Args:
1605            event: Qt context-menu event.
1606        """
1607        self._show_context_menu(event.globalPos())
1608
1609    def resizeEvent(self, event):
1610        """Synchronize overlay geometry after resizing.
1611
1612        Args:
1613            event: Qt resize event.
1614        """
1615        super().resizeEvent(event)
1616        self._right_click_overlay.sync_to_target()
1617
1618    def showEvent(self, event):
1619        """Synchronize overlay geometry after showing the widget.
1620
1621        Args:
1622            event: Qt show event.
1623        """
1624        super().showEvent(event)
1625        self._right_click_overlay.sync_to_target()
1626
1627    def moveEvent(self, event):
1628        """Synchronize overlay geometry after moving the widget.
1629
1630        Args:
1631            event: Qt move event.
1632        """
1633        super().moveEvent(event)
1634        self._right_click_overlay.sync_to_target()
1635
1636    def changeEvent(self, event):
1637        """Handle enabled-state changes and refresh overlays.
1638
1639        Args:
1640            event: Qt change event.
1641        """
1642        super().changeEvent(event)
1643
1644        if event.type() == QEvent.EnabledChange:
1645            enabled = self.isEnabled()
1646            self._slider.setEnabled(enabled)
1647            self._right_click_overlay.sync_to_target()
1648            self._default_red_marker.update()
1649
1650            if not enabled:
1651                self.set_border(SliderBorderState.OFF)
1652
1653            self.update()
1654
1655
1656class NumericRangeSliderBase(LabeledRangeSliderBase[TNum], Generic[TNum]):
1657    """Base class for integer and float range sliders."""
1658
1659    def __init__(
1660        self,
1661        label: str,
1662        unit: str,
1663        value_is_int: bool,
1664        min_val: TNum,
1665        max_val: TNum,
1666        init_vals: Optional[Tuple[TNum, TNum]],
1667        val_fmt: str,
1668        min_limit: TNum | None,
1669        max_limit: TNum | None,
1670        min_limit_inclusive: bool,
1671        max_limit_inclusive: bool,
1672        use_margins: bool,
1673        margins: Tuple[int, int],
1674        show_range: bool,
1675        orientation: Qt.Orientation,
1676        editable: bool,
1677        parent: Optional[QWidget] = None,
1678    ):
1679        """Initialize the numeric range-slider base class.
1680
1681        Args:
1682            label: Slider label text.
1683            unit: Optional unit label.
1684            value_is_int: Whether the slider uses integer values.
1685            min_val: Initial minimum value.
1686            max_val: Initial maximum value.
1687            init_vals: Initial lower and upper values.
1688            val_fmt: Value display format string.
1689            min_limit: Optional lower hard limit.
1690            max_limit: Optional upper hard limit.
1691            min_limit_inclusive: Whether the lower hard limit is inclusive.
1692            max_limit_inclusive: Whether the upper hard limit is inclusive.
1693            use_margins: Whether the slider is currently controlled by margins.
1694            margins: Lower and upper margin values.
1695            show_range: Whether range labels and ticks should be shown.
1696            orientation: Slider orientation.
1697            editable: Whether configuration editing is enabled.
1698            parent: Optional parent widget.
1699        """
1700        super().__init__(
1701            label=label,
1702            unit=unit,
1703            min_val=min_val,
1704            max_val=max_val,
1705            init_vals=init_vals,
1706            orientation=orientation,
1707            val_fmt=val_fmt,
1708            show_range=show_range,
1709            parent=parent,
1710        )
1711
1712        self.value_is_int = value_is_int
1713        self._min_limit = min_limit
1714        self._max_limit = max_limit
1715        self._min_limit_inclusive = min_limit_inclusive
1716        self._max_limit_inclusive = max_limit_inclusive
1717        self._editable = editable
1718        self._use_margins = use_margins
1719        self._margin_lower = margins[0]
1720        self._margin_upper = margins[1]
1721        self._add_right_click_items()
1722        self._set_right_click_item_enabled("edit_config", editable)
1723
1724        self._slider.valueChanged.connect(self._on_slider_values_changed)
1725
1726        self._apply_mode()
1727        self._update_value_width()
1728        self._update_layout()
1729        self._update_all_labels()
1730
1731    def _validate_limit_one(self, name: str, value: TNum) -> None:
1732        """Validate that one value lies within hard limits.
1733
1734        Args:
1735            name: Name of the value being validated.
1736            value: Value to validate.
1737        """
1738        if self._min_limit is not None:
1739            if self._min_limit_inclusive:
1740                ok = value >= self._min_limit
1741            else:
1742                ok = value > self._min_limit
1743            if not ok:
1744                raise ValueError(f"{name} must be within the allowed limits.")
1745
1746        if self._max_limit is not None:
1747            if self._max_limit_inclusive:
1748                ok = value <= self._max_limit
1749            else:
1750                ok = value < self._max_limit
1751            if not ok:
1752                raise ValueError(f"{name} must be within the allowed limits.")
1753
1754    def _validate_pair(self, values: Tuple[Any, Any]) -> Tuple[TNum, TNum]:
1755        """Validate a lower/upper pair.
1756
1757        Args:
1758            values: Pair of proposed lower and upper values.
1759
1760        Returns:
1761            Normalized lower and upper values.
1762        """
1763        lo = self.evaluate_value(values[0])
1764        hi = self.evaluate_value(values[1])
1765
1766        self._validate_limit_one("lower", lo)
1767        self._validate_limit_one("upper", hi)
1768
1769        if hi <= lo:
1770            raise ValueError("upper must be greater than lower")
1771
1772        return lo, hi
1773
1774    def _clamp_pair_to_range(
1775        self,
1776        values: Tuple[TNum, TNum],
1777        new_min: TNum,
1778        new_max: TNum,
1779    ) -> Tuple[TNum, TNum]:
1780        """Clamp a lower/upper pair to a new numeric range.
1781
1782        Args:
1783            values: Pair of lower and upper values.
1784            new_min: New minimum range value.
1785            new_max: New maximum range value.
1786
1787        Returns:
1788            Clamped lower and upper values.
1789        """
1790        lo, hi = values
1791
1792        lo = max(lo, new_min)
1793        hi = min(hi, new_max)
1794
1795        if lo > new_max:
1796            lo = new_min
1797
1798        if hi < new_min:
1799            hi = new_max
1800
1801        return lo, hi
1802
1803    def _add_right_click_items(self):
1804        """Append range-slider-specific context-menu items."""
1805        self._right_click_items.extend(
1806            [
1807                {"id": "sep"},
1808                {"id": "use_values", "text": "Use Values", "checkable": True, "checked": not self._use_margins},
1809                {"id": "set_values", "text": "Set Values..."},
1810                {"id": "sep"},
1811                {"id": "use_margins", "text": "Use Margins", "checkable": True, "checked": self._use_margins},
1812                {"id": "set_margins", "text": "Set Margins..."},
1813                {"id": "sep"},
1814                {"id": "edit_config", "text": "Edit Configuration...", "enabled": True},
1815            ]
1816        )
1817
1818    def _right_click_requested(self, item_id, checked: bool) -> None:
1819        """Dispatch range-slider-specific context-menu actions.
1820
1821        Args:
1822            item_id: Triggered menu item identifier.
1823            checked: Checked state associated with the action.
1824        """
1825        super()._right_click_requested(item_id, checked)
1826        if item_id == "edit_config":
1827            self._open_edit_config_dlg()
1828        elif item_id == "set_values":
1829            self._open_set_values_dlg()
1830        elif item_id == "use_values":
1831            if checked:
1832                self._use_margins = False
1833                self._apply_mode()
1834            else:
1835                self._set_right_click_item_checked("use_values", True)
1836        elif item_id == "use_margins":
1837            if checked:
1838                self._use_margins = True
1839                self._apply_mode()
1840            else:
1841                self._set_right_click_item_checked("use_margins", True)
1842        elif item_id == "set_margins":
1843            self._open_set_margins_dialog()
1844
1845    def _open_edit_config_dlg(self) -> None:
1846        """Open the configuration dialog and apply accepted changes."""
1847        dlg = EditConfigDialog[TNum](
1848            range_slider_name=self._label_text,
1849            value_is_int=self.value_is_int,
1850            min_val=self._min_value,
1851            max_val=self._max_value,
1852            fmt=self._value_fmt,
1853            show_range=self._show_range,
1854            min_limit=self._min_limit,
1855            max_limit=self._max_limit,
1856            min_limit_inclusive=self._min_limit_inclusive,
1857            max_limit_inclusive=self._max_limit_inclusive,
1858        )
1859        if dlg.exec() != QDialog.Accepted:
1860            return
1861
1862        new_min, new_max, new_fmt, new_show_range = dlg.get_values()
1863
1864        old_min = self._min_value
1865        old_max = self._max_value
1866        old_fmt = self._value_fmt
1867        old_show_range = self._show_range
1868
1869        new_min = self.evaluate_value(new_min)
1870        new_max = self.evaluate_value(new_max)
1871
1872        self.set_format(new_fmt)
1873
1874        new_cur = self._clamp_pair_to_range((self._current_lower, self._current_upper), new_min, new_max)
1875        new_dft = self._clamp_pair_to_range((self._default_lower, self._default_upper), new_min, new_max)
1876
1877        needs_clamp = (
1878            new_cur != (self._current_lower, self._current_upper)
1879            or new_dft != (self._default_lower, self._default_upper)
1880        )
1881
1882        if needs_clamp:
1883            self.set_border(SliderBorderState.ERROR)
1884            try:
1885                result = range_slider_ask_clamp_value(
1886                    proposed_range=self._range_to_text((new_min, new_max)),
1887                    old_cur=self._range_to_text((self._current_lower, self._current_upper)),
1888                    old_dft=self._range_to_text((self._default_lower, self._default_upper)),
1889                    new_cur=self._range_to_text(new_cur),
1890                    new_dft=self._range_to_text(new_dft),
1891                    parent=self,
1892                )
1893            finally:
1894                self.set_border(SliderBorderState.OFF)
1895
1896            if result != AskResult.YES:
1897                self.set_format(old_fmt)
1898                return
1899
1900        self._show_range = new_show_range
1901        self.set_range(new_min, new_max)
1902        self._update_layout()
1903
1904        if (
1905            old_min != self._min_value
1906            or old_max != self._max_value
1907            or old_fmt != self._value_fmt
1908            or old_show_range != self._show_range
1909        ):
1910            self.configChanged.emit(self.get_config())
1911
1912    def _open_set_values_dlg(self) -> None:
1913        """Open the value-pair dialog and apply accepted changes."""
1914        dlg = SetValuesDialog[TNum](
1915            slider_name=self._label_text,
1916            value_is_int=self.value_is_int,
1917            current_lower=self._current_lower,
1918            current_upper=self._current_upper,
1919            fmt=self._value_fmt,
1920            min_limit=self._min_limit,
1921            max_limit=self._max_limit,
1922            min_limit_inclusive=self._min_limit_inclusive,
1923            max_limit_inclusive=self._max_limit_inclusive,
1924        )
1925        if dlg.exec() != QDialog.Accepted:
1926            return
1927
1928        new_pair = self._validate_pair(dlg.get_values())
1929        old_pair = self.get_value()
1930        old_default = self.get_default_value()
1931
1932        needs_range_change = not (
1933            self._min_value <= new_pair[0] <= self._max_value
1934            and self._min_value <= new_pair[1] <= self._max_value
1935        )
1936
1937        if needs_range_change:
1938            new_min = min(self._min_value, new_pair[0])
1939            new_max = max(self._max_value, new_pair[1])
1940
1941            self.set_border(SliderBorderState.ERROR)
1942            try:
1943                result = range_slider_ask_extend_range(
1944                    proposed_vals=self._range_to_text(new_pair),
1945                    old_range=self._range_to_text((self._max_value, self._max_value)),
1946                    new_range=self._range_to_text((new_min, new_max)),
1947                    parent=self,
1948                )
1949            finally:
1950                self.set_border(SliderBorderState.OFF)
1951            if result != AskResult.YES:
1952                return
1953
1954        self.set_value({"range": new_pair})
1955
1956        if old_pair != self.get_value():
1957            self.valueChanged.emit(self.get_value())
1958        if old_default != self.get_default_value():
1959            self.defaultChanged.emit(self.get_default_value())
1960
1961    def _apply_mode(self):
1962        """Apply the current values-vs-margins operating mode."""
1963        use_margins = self._use_margins
1964        self._set_right_click_item_checked("use_margins", use_margins)
1965        self._set_right_click_item_checked("use_values", not use_margins)
1966
1967        self._set_right_click_item_enabled("set_margins", use_margins)
1968        self._set_right_click_item_enabled("set_values", not use_margins)
1969        self._set_right_click_item_enabled("save_as_default", not use_margins)
1970        self._set_right_click_item_enabled("reset_to_default", not use_margins)
1971
1972        widgets = [
1973            self._slider,
1974            self._min_label,
1975            self._max_label,
1976            self._value_wrap,
1977        ]
1978
1979        for w in widgets:
1980            w.setEnabled(not use_margins)
1981
1982        if hasattr(self, "_right_click_overlay"):
1983            self._right_click_overlay.sync_to_target()
1984
1985        self.valueChanged.emit(self.get_value())
1986
1987    def _open_set_margins_dialog(self) -> None:
1988        """Open the margins dialog and apply accepted changes."""
1989        dlg = SetMarginsDialog(
1990            slider_name=self._label_text,
1991            margin_lower=self._margin_lower,
1992            margin_upper=self._margin_upper,
1993        )
1994        if dlg.exec() != QDialog.Accepted:
1995            return
1996
1997        new_margin_lo, new_margin_up = dlg.get_values()
1998
1999        if not (new_margin_lo == self._margin_lower and new_margin_up == self._margin_upper):
2000            self._margin_lower = new_margin_lo
2001            self._margin_upper = new_margin_up
2002            self.valueChanged.emit(self.get_value())
2003
2004    def get_config(self) -> dict:
2005        """Return the current configuration mapping.
2006
2007        Returns:
2008            Configuration dictionary containing numeric bounds, display format,
2009            and range-visibility state.
2010        """
2011        return {
2012            "min_val": self._min_value,
2013            "max_val": self._max_value,
2014            "val_fmt": self._value_fmt,
2015            "show_range": self._show_range,
2016        }
2017
2018    def _apply_config(self, config: dict) -> None:
2019        """Apply a validated configuration mapping.
2020
2021        Args:
2022            config: Configuration mapping to apply.
2023        """
2024        self._show_range = config["show_range"]
2025        self.set_format(config["val_fmt"])
2026        self.set_range(config["min_val"], config["max_val"])
2027
2028    def get_value(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
2029        """Return the current values-and-margins state.
2030
2031        Returns:
2032            Mapping containing the active mode, finite range values, and margins.
2033        """
2034        return {
2035            "use_margins": self._use_margins,
2036            "range": (self._current_lower, self._current_upper),
2037            "margins": (self._margin_lower, self._margin_upper),
2038        }
2039
2040    def get_current_value(self) -> Tuple[TNum, TNum]:
2041        """Return the current finite lower and upper values."""
2042        return self._current_lower, self._current_upper
2043
2044    def get_default_value(self) -> Tuple[TNum, TNum]:
2045        """Return the stored default lower and upper values."""
2046        return self._default_lower, self._default_upper
2047
2048    def get_min_value(self) -> TNum:
2049        """Return the current minimum range value."""
2050        return self._min_value
2051
2052    def get_max_value(self) -> TNum:
2053        """Return the current maximum range value."""
2054        return self._max_value
2055
2056    def set_value(self, value: Dict[str, Any], keep_default_value: bool = False) -> None:
2057        """Set the current state of the range slider.
2058
2059        Args:
2060            value: Mapping containing ``use_margins``, ``range``, and
2061                optionally ``margins``.
2062            keep_default_value: Whether to preserve the stored default range.
2063        """
2064        self._use_margins = value.get("use_margins", self._use_margins)
2065        self._set_right_click_item_checked("use_margins", self._use_margins)
2066        self._set_right_click_item_checked("use_values", not self._use_margins)
2067        range_values = value.get("range", (self._current_lower, self._current_upper))
2068        self._margin_lower, self._margin_upper = value.get(
2069            "margins",
2070            (self._margin_lower, self._margin_upper),
2071        )
2072        lo, hi = self._validate_pair(range_values)
2073        self._current_lower = lo
2074        self._current_upper = hi
2075        if not keep_default_value:
2076            self._default_lower = lo
2077            self._default_upper = hi
2078
2079        cfg_changed = False
2080        if lo < self._min_value:
2081            self._min_value = lo
2082            cfg_changed = True
2083        if hi > self._max_value:
2084            self._max_value = hi
2085            cfg_changed = True
2086
2087        self._slider.blockSignals(True)
2088        try:
2089            self._slider.setRange(float(self._min_value), float(self._max_value))
2090            self._slider.setValues((float(lo), float(hi)))
2091        finally:
2092            self._slider.blockSignals(False)
2093
2094        self._update_all_labels()
2095        self._update_value_width()
2096        self._apply_mode()
2097
2098        if cfg_changed:
2099            self.configChanged.emit(self.get_config())
2100
2101    def set_default_value(self, value: Tuple[TNum, TNum]) -> None:
2102        """Set the stored default lower and upper values.
2103
2104        Args:
2105            value: New default lower and upper values.
2106        """
2107        lo, hi = self._validate_pair(value)
2108        self._default_lower = lo
2109        self._default_upper = hi
2110
2111        cfg_changed = False
2112        if lo < self._min_value:
2113            self._min_value = lo
2114            cfg_changed = True
2115        if hi > self._max_value:
2116            self._max_value = hi
2117            cfg_changed = True
2118
2119        self._slider.blockSignals(True)
2120        try:
2121            self._slider.setRange(float(self._min_value), float(self._max_value))
2122            self._slider.setValues((float(self._current_lower), float(self._current_upper)))
2123        finally:
2124            self._slider.blockSignals(False)
2125
2126        self._update_all_labels()
2127        self._update_value_width()
2128
2129        if cfg_changed:
2130            self.configChanged.emit(self.get_config())
2131
2132    def set_range(self, min_val: TNum, max_val: TNum) -> None:
2133        """Set the finite numeric range.
2134
2135        Args:
2136            min_val: New minimum value.
